# PixelStub

PixelStub is a free, no sign-up placeholder image generator for creating custom dummy image URLs in the browser.

Canonical site: https://pixelstub.pages.dev/

## What PixelStub Does

- Builds placeholder image URLs from width, height, background color, text color, text, and image format.
- Supports common presets including Open Graph, square, widescreen, and avatar placeholders.
- Supports PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, and WebP formats.
- Uses a Cloudflare Worker API to validate placeholder specs and build deterministic upstream image URLs.

## Useful Pages

- App: https://pixelstub.pages.dev/
- Sitemap: https://pixelstub.pages.dev/sitemap.xml
- GitHub frontend: https://github.com/michaelsam94/pixelstub-frontend
- GitHub backend: https://github.com/michaelsam94/pixelstub-backend

## Common Questions

What is PixelStub?
PixelStub is an online placeholder image generator for developers, designers, and technical writers.

Does PixelStub require an account?
No. PixelStub does not require sign-up for placeholder image URL generation.

Can PixelStub create a 600x400 placeholder?
Yes. Set width to 600 and height to 400, then choose colors, format, and optional text.
